channel.title: GNtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WIRED’s Smart Home Ecosystem Guide (2026)
item.description: If you’re waffling between Alexa, Siri, and Google, the answer may already be in your home.

item.title: The Hottest Anti-AI Gadget Is a Cyberdeck
item.description: On TikTok, young women are going viral for crafting whimsical homemade computers inside purses.

item.title: Stop Trying to Unmask Satoshi Nakamoto
item.description: On this week’s Big Interview podcast, actor-director Ben McKenzie talks about the rise of crypto, why he finds it dangerous, and why it benefits from ...

item.title: The 4 Best Laptop Power Banks We've Tested (2026)
item.description: If you’re looking for the perfect laptop power bank, I’ve tested ‘em all, and these are the best.
